ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "stem" TEXT /* The question stem */,
  "answer" INTEGER /* The correct answer */,
  "choice" TEXT /* A list of possible choices */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the question was last updated */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* The difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the question (e.g., science, sports) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* The sub-category of the question (e.g., physics, basketball) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the question being predicted */,
  "prediction" INTEGER /* The predicted answer */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Whether the prediction is accurate or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the prediction was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the AI model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the prediction being rated */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* The feedback given by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* The rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the feedback was last updated */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback is resolved or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the question being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* The sentiment of the question (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "score" REAL /* The sentiment score of the question (-1 to 1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the AI model used for sentiment analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity recognition result */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the question being analyzed */,
  "entity" TEXT /* The recognized entity */,
  "type" TEXT /* The type of the entity (person, organization, location) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the entity recognition was performed */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the AI model used for entity recognition */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence score of the entity recognition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic modeling result */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the question being analyzed */,
  "topic" TEXT /* The recognized topic */,
  "score" REAL /* The score of the topic (0 to 1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the topic modeling was performed */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the AI model used for topic modeling */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence score of the topic modeling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user interacting with the AI model */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the question being interacted with */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* The date of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the interaction was created */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* The type of interaction (e.g., question_asked, feedback_given) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* The name of the profile */,
  "profile_description" TEXT /* The description of the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_tracking" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the question */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* The user's progress (0-100) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the progress was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the progress was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the AI model */,
  "metric" TEXT /* The performance metric (accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "value" REAL /* The value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the performance was created */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the AI model used for evaluation */,
  "dataset_used" TEXT /* The dataset used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)
